title: Modular mattress systems and methods
abstract: Modular mattress systems and methods are described. For example, a modular mattress can include a fabric cover configured to surround at least two foam layers. The fabric cover can include an opening to allow access to an interior region of the fabric cover. The mattress can include a first foam layer positioned within the interior region of the fabric cover, and an encasement layer positioned below the first foam layer. The encasement layer can include a recess configured to receive one or more modular support sections. The mattress can also include a plurality of modular support components received within the recess of the encasement.
claims: Claims WHAT IS CLAIMED IS: 1. A mattress, comprising: a fabric cover forming an interior region configured to surround at least two foam layers, the fabric cover comprising an opening to allow access to the interior region of the fabric cover; a first foam layer positioned within the interior region of the fabric cover, the first foam layer having a first side and a second side opposite the first side, the first side being an upper surface, and the second side being a lower surface; an encasement layer positioned below the first foam layer on the lower surface, the encasement layer comprising a recess configured to receive one or more modular support sections; and a plurality of modular support components received within the recess of the encasement. 2. The mattress of Claim 1, wherein the recess comprises a keyed profile configured to engage with at least some of the one or more module support sections. 3. The mattress of Claim 2, wherein the keyed profiled comprises a honeycomb shape. 4. The mattress of Claim 1, wherein the one or more modular support sections comprise a head section, a torso section, and a foot section. 5. The mattress of Claim 4, wherein at least one of the head section, the torso section, and the foot section comprises at least two foam layers and is reversible. 6. The mattress of Claim 4, wherein at least one of the head section, the torso section, and the foot section comprises perforations such that subsections can be removed and replaced. 7. The mattress of Claim 1, wherein the one or more modular support comprise a plurality of individual modular support components. 8. The mattress of Claim 7, wherein at least one of the modular support components comprises a foam having a density different than a foam of another of the modular support components. 9. The mattress of Claim 7, wherein at least one of the modular support components comprises a hexagonal shape. 10. The mattress of Claim 7, wherein at least one of the modular support components comprises at least two foam layers and is reversible. 11. The mattress of Claim 7, wherein the plurality of individual modular support components are arranged within the recess in a honeycomb pattern. 12. The mattress of Claim 7, wherein the plurality of individual modular support components comprise at least 10, 20, 30, 40, 50, 60, 70, 80, or 100 modular support components. 13. The mattress of Claim 1, wherein the recess extends entirely through the encasement. 14. The mattress of Claim 1, wherein the recess extends partially through the encasement. 15. The mattress of Claim 1, wherein the encasement comprises foam. 16. A mattress, comprising: a fabric cover configured to surround at least two foam layers within an interior region, the fabric cover comprising an opening to allow access to the interior region of the fabric cover; a first foam layer positioned within the interior region of the fabric cover, the first foam layer comprising a first type of foam; and a second foam layer positioned within the interior region of the fabric cover and below the first foam layer, the second foam layer comprising two sublayers joined together, the two sublayers comprising a first sublayer comprising a second type of foam and a second sublayer comprising a third type of foam, wherein a support level of the mattress can be adjusted by flipping the second foam layer. 17. The mattress of Claim 16, wherein the opening is closeable with a zipper. 18. The mattress of Claim 16, wherein the second foam layer comprises a right part and a separate left part. 19. The mattress of Claim 18, wherein the first foam layer covers both the right part and the left part. 20. A method for customizing a mattress, the method comprising: selecting a plurality of modular support components, at least some of the modular support components having different foam densities; arranging the plurality of modular support components within a recess in an encasement; enclosing the encasement and the plurality of modular support components within a fabric cover. 21. The method of Claim 20, further comprising positioning a foam layer within the fabric cover over the encasement and the plurality of modular support components. 22. The method of Claim 20, further comprising adjusting the mattress by: removing at least one of the plurality of modular support components; and replacing it with another modular support components having a different foam density. 23. The method of Claim 20, wherein arranging the plurality of modular support components within a recess in an encasement comprises consulting with a chiropractor, doctor, or other healthcare professional. 24. The method of Claim 20, wherein the plurality of modular support components comprise a head section, a torso section, and a foot section. 25. The method of Claim 24, wherein at least one of the head section, the torso section, and the foot section comprises at least two foam layers and is reversible. 26. The method of Claim 20, wherein at least one of the modular support components comprises a hexagonal shape. 27. The method of Claim 20, wherein at least one of the modular support components comprises at least two foam layers and is reversible, and the method further comprises reversing the least one of the modular support component.
